Hero.description: Explore the beauty of Yogyakarta and its surroundings with the best selection of vehicles. Easy rental, affordable prices, unforgettable journey.

step1.title: Select Vehicle & Date
step1.desc: Choose your desired vehicle and set the rental date according to your travel needs.

step2.title: Confirm via WhatsApp
step2.desc: Confirm your booking via WhatsApp for a fast and easy process.

step3.title: Pick Up & Drive
step3.desc: Pick up the vehicle at the agreed location and start your adventure!

Destinations.subtitle: Explore
Destinations.title: Recommended Destinations
Destinations.desc: Find the best destinations you can visit with our rental vehicles

1.title: Ancient Wonders & Cultural Trails
1.desc: Explore the breathtaking historical temples, palaces, and cultural trails of Yogyakarta.

2.title: Borobudur World Heritage
2.desc: Visit Borobudur Temple, a world wonder that holds the story of ancient Buddhist civilization.

3.title: South Coast Charm
3.desc: Enjoy the beauty of the southern beaches, mountains, and the stunning natural charm of Yogyakarta.

WhyUs.subtitle: Benefits
WhyUs.title: Why Choose Us
WhyUs.desc: We provide the best vehicle rental services with premium quality and professional service.

1.title: Vehicle Fleet
1.desc: 50+ well-maintained vehicles ready to accompany your journey

2.title: Happy Customers
2.desc: 500+ satisfied customers with our rental services

3.title: Best Price
3.desc: Competitive and transparent prices with no hidden fees

4.title: Star Rating
4.desc: 4.9/5 rating from our customers on Google Reviews

Testimonials.subtitle: Testimonials
Testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
Testimonials.desc: Hear firsthand experiences from our satisfied customers

1.text: LA Group is highly recommended! The car was clean, well-maintained, and very affordable. The booking process via WhatsApp was also super easy. Will definitely rent again!

2.text: I've rented here 3 times and I'm always satisfied. The vehicles are always in prime condition, the staff is friendly, and delivery is on time. Top notch!

3.text: Rented an Avanza for a family trip to Jogja. Comfortable car, cold AC, and got a special rate for a 3-day rental. Thank you LA Group!

Footer.desc: Trusted vehicle rental provider in Yogyakarta. Serving car and motorcycle rentals for tourism, business, and personal needs.
